import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import '../styles/RecordingIndicators.css'; function RecordingIndicators() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); const [indicatorsData, setIndicatorsData] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { setIndicatorsData(sampleData); }, []); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('user_id'); navigate('/'); }; const toggleSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(!isSidebarOpen); }; return (

Date FEV1 FVC PEF Respiratory Rate Pulse Cough Breathlessness Wheezing Chest Tightness Nighttime Awakenings Medicine
{row.date} {row.fev1} {row.fvc} {row.pef} {row.respiratoryRate} {row.pulse} {row.cough} {row.breathlessness} {row.wheezing} {row.chestTightness} {row.nighttimeAwakenings} {row.medicine}

); } export default RecordingIndicators;
